description_long: This is a compact, modern-style couch with a boxy main body and three separate, rectangular cushions arranged in front of it. The main seating block is solid and squared, while the cushions are slightly angled and appear loose, suggesting they can be repositioned or removed. The upholstery is a uniform, matte brown color with no visible patterns or decorative stitching. There are no visible legs, giving the couch a grounded, monolithic appearance. The armrests and backrest are integrated into the main body, with no distinct separation or embellishments. The overall design is minimalist, suitable for urban parks, public waiting areas, or contemporary outdoor spaces.
description: A minimalist, boxy brown couch with three loose rectangular cushions in front and no visible legs or decorative features.
description_view_0: The main couch block is seen from the side with three loose cushions arranged in front, two lying flat and one propped up.
description_view_1: A direct end-on view showing the narrow profile of the couch and cushions, emphasizing the solid, blocky shape.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the main couch block and three cushions visible from a different angle.
description_view_3: A top-down or rear view showing the alignment of the cushions in front of the main couch block, highlighting their rectangular shape.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three loose, rectangular seat cushions are placed in front of the main couch block; no visible back or accent pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid, matte brown fabric with no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_leg_style: No visible legs; the couch appears to rest directly on the ground with a monolithic base.
attribute_armrest_design: Armrests are absent or fully integrated into the main block, with no distinct separation or visual features.
attribute_backrest_type: The backrest is integrated and continuous with the main body, low and unembellished, with no visible tufting or division.
